entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: Cicer arietinum L., the crop studied for drought tolerance and plant vigour

entities.name: TERMINAL DROUGHT STRESS
entities.description: Stress occurring at the end of the growth cycle leading to yield losses

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The agricultural productivity of the crop

entities.name: WATER LIMITATION
entities.description: The state of insufficient water supply for the crop

entities.name: TRANSPIRATION RATE
entities.description: The rate at which water is lost from the plant through evaporation

entities.name: CANOPY DEVELOPMENT DYNAMICS
entities.description: The patterns and rates of growth of the plant canopy

entities.name: CROP IDEOTYPES
entities.description: Ideal plant architectures designed for specific environmental conditions

entities.name: WATER LIMITED ENVIRONMENTS
entities.description: Environments characterized by scarce water availability

entities.name: PLANT VIGOUR
entities.description: The overall growth strength and health of the plant, encompassing growth and canopy size

entities.name: GROWTH
entities.description: The increase in physical size of the plant

entities.name: CANOPY SIZE
entities.description: The physical dimensions of the plant canopy

entities.name: CANOPY CONDUCTANCE
entities.description: The measure of how easily water vapor exits the plant canopy

entities.name: RECOMBINANT INBRED LINES
entities.description: A population of lines derived from a cross between two parents and subsequent selfing

entities.name: ICC 4958
entities.description: A high vigour parent chickpea line

entities.name: ICC 1882
entities.description: A parent chickpea line used in the cross

entities.name: VEGETATIVE STAGE
entities.description: The period of plant growth prior to the reproductive stage

entities.name: WELL-WATERED CONDITIONS
entities.description: Environments where water supply is sufficient for the crop

entities.name: LEASYSCAN
entities.description: A high throughput phenotyping platform used for plant measurement

entities.name: QUANTITATIVE TRAIT LOCI
entities.description: Genomic regions associated with a quantitative trait

entities.name: ULTRA-HIGH DENSITY BIN MAP
entities.description: A high-resolution genetic mapping technique used to identify QTLs

entities.name: CALG04
entities.description: A specific linkage group or chromosome in the chickpea genome

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of the plant to maintain productivity under water stress

entities.name: QTL-HOTSPOT
entities.description: A genomic region containing multiple quantitative trait loci

entities.name: CALG03
entities.description: A specific linkage group or chromosome in the chickpea genome

entities.name: GENETIC MAPS
entities.description: Representations of the relative positions of markers on a chromosome

entities.name: PHENOTYPIC VARIATION
entities.description: The observable differences in traits among individuals in a population
